name: airbyte-admin-pp-mcp
description: Read-only Airbyte administration MCP server for inspecting workspaces, connections, jobs, sources, destinations, connector definitions, and access metadata.

airbyte_admin_base_url.title: AIRBYTE_ADMIN_BASE_URL
airbyte_admin_base_url.description: Optional Airbyte API root. Use https://cloud.airbyte.com/api for Airbyte Cloud or http://localhost:8000/api for a local self-managed instance.

airbyte_admin_token.title: AIRBYTE_ADMIN_TOKEN
airbyte_admin_token.description: Optional Airbyte bearer token. The CLI adds the Bearer prefix if omitted.

airbyte_admin_auth_header.title: AIRBYTE_ADMIN_AUTH_HEADER
airbyte_admin_auth_header.description: Optional full Authorization header such as Basic ... for self-managed deployments.
